arts.ttl: PSG boss Luis Enrique issues Champions League warning before Liverpool second leg: "We have nothing to lose"
arts.sum: PSG must score at Anfield in Tuesday’s second leg

arts.ttl: Arne Slot concerned by Liverpool energy levels ahead of crunch PSG tie
arts.sum: Arne Slot laid into his players at halftime after they put in a sluggish performance against Southampton on Saturday, and reminded the players they will have to up their energy levels against PSG next week. The Reds went into the break a goal down at Anfield after Will Smallbone scored in stoppage time. The hosts […] The post Arne Slot concerned by Liverpool energy levels ahead of crunch PSG tie first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak transfer twist as Liverpool handed Arsenal boost amid £150m Newcastle stance
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal have been among the Premier League clubs said to be interested in Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez and Arne Slot thankful for decisive moment and Liverpool's second chance
arts.sum: After his key role in Harvey Elliott's winner against PSG in midweek, Darwin Nunez helped put Southampton to the sword at Anfield on Saturday, playing a big part in the Reds' comeback win

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot explains Dominik Szoboszlai substitution as Reds close in on Premier League title
arts.sum: Liverpool’s key midfielder was taken off at half-time despite trailing against Southampton

arts.ttl: Liverpool 3-1 Southampton: Player ratings as Nunez & Salah star in comeback victory
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez - who arguably could have been sent off during the first half for kicking out at Kyle Walker-Peters - dragged Liverpool into the lead, finishing Luis Diaz's excellent cross before winning a penalty for Mohamed Salah to convert. An almighty mix-up between Virgil van Dijk and midweek hero Alisson gifted Will Smallbone an open goal inside the penalty area, with the midfielder gladly accepting the invitation to give Southampton a shock lead.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez decision during Liverpool win leaves Southampton boss furious
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez was crucial to Liverpool's 3-1 victory over Southampton as he scored the equaliser before winning a penalty to help them come from behind, but Saints boss Ivan Juric has insisted it was never a spot kick

arts.ttl: 'His head was going for us' - Mohamed Salah reveals Arne Slot anger at Liverpool in Southampton win
arts.sum: Liverpool eventually ran out 3-1 winners at home to Southampton to move 16 points clear at the top of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Hits & misses: What should Liverpool do with Nunez?
arts.sum: The Sky Sports football writers analyse Saturday's Premier League action, with Liverpool set to have a big decision to make this summer about the future of striker Darwin Nunez.

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard 'aged' by Rangers job as Ibrox return murmur erupts with Liverpool first on reunion tour
arts.sum: The out of work boss is looking for his next job after departing Al Ettifaq amid their Saudi Pro League struggles earlier this season
